'''Langhesa''' was the [[Langhesi]] homeworld presumably found in the [[Langhesa system/Legends|Langhesa system]], conquered in [[129 BBY]] by the [[Tsinimal]]s. This led to a mass migration of Langhesi offworld.

{{Planet-stub}}
